def eligible_for_housing_assistance(self) -> bool:
        if (self.gender.lower() in [gender.value for gender in Gender] and
                self.age in [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61] and
                self.race.lower() in [race.value for race in Race] and
                self.employment_status.lower() in [status.value for status in EmploymentStatus] and
                self.education.lower() in [edu.value for edu in Education] and
                self.marital_status.lower() in [status.value for status in MaritalStatus] and
                self.religion.lower() in [religion.value for religion in Religion] and
                500 <= self.monthly_rent <= 1500 and
                12000 <= self.annual_income <= 30000):
            return True
        else:
            return False
